item.title: These Democrats aren't ready to jettison big business as party stalwarts shift left
item.description: The New Democrat Coalition has a moderate plan — shared first with CNBC — to propel their party to win control of the House in November.

item.title: Trump Canada tariffs face House vote after Republican leaders fail to block rebellion
item.description: Republican House leaders tried, and failed, to pass a measure on Tuesday that would have blocked House disapproval votes on Trump tariffs through July...

item.title: Tariff bills across U.S. states mount as affordability and Trump head for midterm elections showdown
item.description: New data shows that states where key midterm elections races will take place paid over $134 billion in tariffs during 2025 as affordability issues mou...

item.title: GOP defectors help spike House measure to block tariff disapproval votes
item.description: The House on Tuesday voted against language that would have blocked challenges to Trump's tariffs through the summer.

item.title: DC grand jury declines to indict Sens. Kelly, Slotkin for seditious conspiracy: MS Now
item.description: President Donald Trump had blasted six Democrats in Congress for a video reminding American military service members of their right to refuse illegal ...
